transcription.text: American Airlines has such a beautiful prize to the Caribbean. Well, I just got carried away. Now, leave winter behind for American's Caribbean for only $399. And this great $399 package includes hotel and airfare to any one of 12 sun-drenched Caribbean islands. So, what are you waiting for? We're American Airlines, doing what we do best.
